expected_improvement: Establish the post-party venue, wristband, and reader in one coherent cinematic plate.
actual_result: Environment mood passed. Foreground object read as a glow stick rather than a wristband and the gate was too soft to carry the metaphor.
reviewer_decision: Retain as environment plate; build the wristband, reader, and scanner ring deterministically. No paid retry.

expected_improvement: Prove Nina, one permission wristband, party exit, and delayed door unlock can hold in one continuous shot.
actual_result: Actor, location, and camera motion passed. The model placed a glowing wristband on both wrists and the door began open, so the prop continuity and delayed-unlock cause-and-effect failed.
reviewer_decision: Reject. Hold the remaining 63 approved credits. Do not submit the morning or resolution tests until Gabe approves a corrected party retry.

changed_variable: corrected party start frame and causal prompt
expected_improvement: Keep one band on the raised wrist, start with the door shut, and unlock only after the reader reacts.
actual_result: One band stayed on the same wrist. The reader changed state and the door opened near the end of the shot.
reviewer_decision: Pass and retain as the party source.

expected_improvement: Carry the same lead and one wristband into a quiet morning laptop scene.
actual_result: Identity, wristband, hands, and performance passed. A laptop logo appeared late in the source.
reviewer_decision: Pass with a deterministic 1.2x crop that removes the incidental logo.

expected_improvement: Show the same band power down after the revoke, followed by a restrained relief smile.
actual_result: The single band powered down to dark, hands stayed natural, and the relief beat read clearly.
reviewer_decision: Pass and retain as the resolution source.
Pass with the locked final crop.
